name: Swiss Alpine Elegance
overviewDescription: A 6-day journey through the heart of the Swiss Alps, from the medieval streets of Lucerne to the car-free mountain air of Zermatt.
overviewExtended: Experience Switzerland exactly as it should be seen: via the world's most scenic trains, in historic lakeside hotels and at the foot of the mighty Matterhorn. We combine private boat cruises with gourmet alpine dining and exclusive mountain access.
transport: Swiss Travel Pass & First Class Rail
itinerary: Day 1: Arrival in Zurich and Lucerne;;Private transfer from Zurich to Lucerne.
